title: astragalus terrestris
intro: Astragalus terrestris, also known as milkvetch or Huang Qi, is a perennial plant species in the legume family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to boost the immune system and enhance overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus terrestris include its anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and anti-viral properties, making it beneficial for reducing stress, improving sleep, and fighting off infections. Astragalus terrestris can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which may help to support adrenal function, alleviate fatigue, and promote a healthy immune response.
